HomeDestinationsPabong
Sikkim

Pabong

The Untouched Himalayan Hamlet

Silent snow-blanketed village under crystal skies, warmth glowing from wooden cottages.

4.4
(56 reviews)
Mangan, Sikkim
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
18°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Pabong is a pristine village in North Sikkim, surrounded by snow-capped peaks, alpine meadows, and rhododendron forests. A paradise for nature lovers and solitude seekers.

History

A traditional Lepcha settlement that has remained largely untouched by modern tourism.

Altitude

2,100 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Mangan, Sikkim

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Rhododendron Forest

Dense forest with blooming rhododendrons in spring.

Culture

Lepcha Heritage Museum

Showcases the rich culture of the Lepcha tribe.

KuboVista

Pabong Lake

A serene glacial lake surrounded by prayer flags.

Why visit: Peaceful and spiritually uplifting

Viewpoints

panoramic

Kanchenjunga Viewpoint

Close-up views of the third highest peak.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Pabong Kitchen

4.2

Sikkimese • ₹200-400

Authentic local food prepared with organic ingredients.

Cafes

Mountain Brew

4.0

Specialty: Butter Tea

Traditional Tibetan butter tea and snacks.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Village Cooperative

Handicrafts made by local women.

Handwoven basketsOrganic honeyTraditional shawls

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Village Trek

Moderate

Trek through remote villages and forests.

4-5 hrs
₹1,000

Breakfast

₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
